title: Section 17
content: In all matters of conduct and discipline, the apprentice shall be governed by the rules and regulations 1[applicable to employees of the corresponding category] in the establishment in which the apprentice is undergoing training.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 27 of 1973, s. 15, for "applicable to workers in the trade" (w.e.f. 1-12-1974).
